profile_summary: Leisure traveler (mid budget) prioritizing central location, accessibility, service.

recommendations.justification: The Meridian Plaza, London ranks #1 for this traveler on central location (+0.91), accessibility (+0.76), service (+0.89), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler."

supporting_evidence.quote: The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler.
Fantastic for families — connecting rooms, a kids' club, and high chairs at breakfast.
Excellent accessibility — wide doorways, roll-in shower, and helpful staff.

recommendations.justification: The Belmont, Seoul ranks #2 for this traveler on central location (+0.91), accessibility (+0.79), service (+0.79), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Excellent accessibility — wide doorways, roll-in shower, and helpful staff."

supporting_evidence.quote: Excellent accessibility — wide doorways, roll-in shower, and helpful staff.
Slept beautifully — very quiet despite being central.
The level of refinement and personal service was world-class.

recommendations.justification: Casa Harbour, Istanbul ranks #3 for this traveler on central location (+0.91), accessibility (+0.81), service (+0.82), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Excellent accessibility — wide doorways, roll-in shower, and helpful staff."

supporting_evidence.quote: Excellent accessibility — wide doorways, roll-in shower, and helpful staff.
The level of refinement and personal service was world-class.
Just steps from a beautiful stretch of beach with loungers ready.
